source: Toyota Warranty & Maintenance Guide - 2021 RAV4 Hybrid

maintenance.service: Rotate tires; inspect wiper blades, fluid levels, brake linings/pads, and HV battery cooling intake filter
maintenance.notes: Hybrid guide includes recurring HV battery cooling intake filter inspection.

maintenance.service: Replace engine oil and oil filter

interval.logic: Every 10,000 miles or 12 months when 0W-16 oil is used

maintenance.notes: Use 5,000 miles or 6 months under listed special operating conditions or if 0W-16 was not used.

maintenance.service: Clean HV battery cooling intake filter

interval.logic: Clean every 20,000 miles; inspect every 5,000 miles and clean if necessary

maintenance.notes: Hybrid-specific maintenance item from the RAV4 Hybrid guide.

maintenance.service: Replace cabin air filter and engine air filter

interval.logic: Initial engine coolant replacement at 100,000 miles or 120 months; then every 50,000 miles or 60 months

maintenance.notes: Inverter coolant has a different initial interval of 150,000 miles or 180 months.

maintenance.service: Replace automatic transmission fluid and rear differential oil
maintenance.notes: Applies to listed towing/car-top carrier/heavy loading conditions; do not present as normal-use service.

applicability: Built separately from gasoline RAV4 records because hybrid filter and coolant rules differ
validation_flags: Candidate built from official RAV4 Hybrid warranty and maintenance guide.
Hybrid-specific filter and coolant items must be preserved.
Rendered-page verification still required before production integration.
